description: Composition Red jersey for men made of 100% polyester, with Dri-Fit technology, short raglan sleeves, round neck, white panels on the sides and nike swoosh on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron; do not iron on decorations At the gym, on the beach or simply enjoying those healthy runs, there's no better way to do it than in this nike jersey. Smart to look at and engineered with Dry-Fit technology to ensure you stay dry and fresh all day, there's nothing better an active man can ask for. The contoured panels add a dash of style to this tee. Pair it with track pants or shorts and sports shoes to complete that uber cool look.
